content.text:
<timestamp>Friday, Jul 3, 2026, 3:07 PM (UTC+7)</timestamp>
<user_query>
User says "сам делай" - configure MoySklad ТС ПИоТ от ЕСП on remote PC 26.79.213.133 WITHOUT asking user to do web UI manually.

WinRM: usr1cv8 / usr1cv8
Store ID: e87bd531-abc8-11ee-0a80-07a9004c1980 (Шоурум)
POS token that worked for GET: 7c003a064e8c3885cb410168fdb4505a84a5471f, cashier manager@charisma24
ESM port: 127.0.0.1:51401 (must be listening via esm-cm-00106107290460)

## Known blockers
- PUT https://online.moysklad.ru/api/posap/1.0/settings/retailstore/ → MethodNotAllowed
- Local sqlite patch of piotSettings did NOT switch app from PiotOnlineValidation to ESP
- Remap API needs account login:password (Basic auth)

## Try ALL approaches (fast, in order):
1. Find MoySklad account password on remote: cmdkey, browser cookies (Network/Cookies sqlite), leveldb, saved passwords, Remap API token in config files
2. If found: PUT https://api.moysklad.ru/api/remap/1.2/entity/retailstore/e87bd531-abc8-11ee-0a80-07a9004c1980 with markingEnabled:true, piotSettings:{mode:"esp",host:"127.0.0.1:51401"}
3. Try POS admin endpoints, batch, POST alternatives for settings
4. Try modifying remote_settings + local_settings in sqlite with correct JSON structure including markingEnabled and piotSettings, bump version, stop kassa, update, start kassa, force sync if there's sync RPC endpoint
5. Ensure esm-cm service running on 51401
6. After any change: restart MoySklad, wait 30s, grep app.log for PiotEsp/PiotOffline/51401 vs PiotOnlineValidation/cdn.crpt.ru
7. Also GET POS settings/retailstore/ to verify piotSettings on server

Report brief Russian result: worked or not, what method succeeded, can user sell with ESP now.

sqlite3: C:\Users\1\AppData\Local\Temp\sqlite-tools\sqlite3.exe
MoySklad exe: C:\Program Files (x86)\moysklad-kassa\ (Касса МойСклад.exe)
DB: C:\Users\1\AppData\Roaming\moysklad-kassa\retail_e87bd531-abc8-11ee-0a80-07a9004c1980.sqlite
</user_query>

Подключаюсь к удалённому ПК и ищу учётные данные MoySklad для настройки ТС ПИоТ через ESP.

[REDACTED]

input.command: $cred = New-Object PSCredential('usr1cv8', (ConvertTo-SecureString 'usr1cv8' -AsPlainText -Force)); Test-WSMan -ComputerName 26.79.213.133 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Invoke-Command -ComputerName 26.79.213.133 -Credential $cred -ScriptBlock { hostname; whoami } -ErrorAction Stop
input.description: Test WinRM connection to remote PC

input.command:
$cred = New-Object PSCredential('usr1cv8', (ConvertTo-SecureString 'usr1cv8' -AsPlainText -Force))
Invoke-Command -ComputerName 26.79.213.133 -Credential $cred -ScriptBlock {
  $sqlite = 'C:\Users\1\AppData\Local\Temp\sqlite-tools\sqlite3.exe'
  $db = 'C:\Users\1\AppData\Roaming\moysklad-kassa\retail_e87bd531-abc8-11ee-0a80-07a9004c1980.sqlite'
  
  Write-Host "=== SQLITE TABLES ==="
  & $sqlite $db ".tables"
  
  Write-Host "`n=== remote_settings / local_settings ==="
  & $sqlite $db "SELECT key, length(value), substr(value,1,500) FROM remote_settings LIMIT 20;"
  & $sqlite $db "SELECT key, length(value), substr(value,1,500) FROM local_settings LIMIT 20;"
  
  Write-Host "`n=== piot/marking search in sqlite ==="
  & $sqlite $db "SELECT key, value FROM remote_settings WHERE value LIKE '%piot%' OR value LIKE '%marking%' OR value LIKE '%esp%';"
  & $sqlite $db "SELECT key, value FROM local_settings WHERE value LIKE '%piot%' OR value LIKE '%marking%' OR value LIKE '%esp%';"
  
  Write-Host "`n=== auth/token in sqlite ==="
  & $sqlite $db "SELECT key, substr(value,1,300) FROM remote_settings WHERE key LIKE '%auth%' OR key LIKE '%token%' OR key LIKE '%login%' OR key LIKE '%password%' OR key LIKE '%account%';"
  & $sqlite $db "SELECT key, substr(value,1,300) FROM local_settings WHERE key LIKE '%auth%' OR key LIKE '%token%' OR key LIKE '%login%' OR key LIKE '%password%' OR key LIKE '%account%';"
  
  Write-Host "`n=== version tables ==="
  & $sqlite $db "SELECT name FROM sqlite_master WHERE type='table';" | ForEach-Object { if ($_ -match 'version|setting|config|auth|user|account') { Write-Host $_ } }
  
  Write-Host "`n=== ESM service ==="
  Get-Service -Name '*esm*' -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Format-Table Name, Status, DisplayName
  netstat -an | Select-String '51401'
  
  Write-Host "`n=== Local Storage search ==="
  $ldb = 'C:\Users\1\AppData\Roaming\moysklad-kassa\Local Storage\leveldb'
  Get-ChildItem $ldb -Filter *.ldb,*.log -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | ForEach-Object {
    $bytes = [System.IO.File]::ReadAllBytes($_.FullName)
    $text = [System.Text.Encoding]::UTF8.GetString($bytes)
    if ($text -match 'password|login|token|remap|piot|marking|charisma|manager@') {
      Write-Host "--- $($_.Name) ---"
      # extract readable strings
      [regex]::Matches($text, '[\x20-\x7E]{8,}') | ForEach-Object { if ($_.Value -match 'password|login|token|piot|marking|charisma|manager@|moysklad|remap') { $_.Value } } | Select-Object -First 30
    }
  }
} 2>&1
input.description: Inspect sqlite DB and ESM service on remote
GET POS retailstore settings from MoySklad API

input.command:
$cred = New-Object PSCredential('usr1cv8', (ConvertTo-SecureString 'usr1cv8' -AsPlainText -Force))
Invoke-Command -ComputerName 26.79.213.133 -Credential $cred -ScriptBlock {
  $sqlite = 'C:\Users\1\AppData\Local\Temp\sqlite-tools\sqlite3.exe'
  $db = 'C:\Users\1\AppData\Roaming\moysklad-kassa\retail_e87bd531-abc8-11ee-0a80-07a9004c1980.sqlite'
  
  Write-Host "=== SCHEMA remote_settings ==="
  & $sqlite $db "PRAGMA table_info(remote_settings);"
  Write-Host "=== SCHEMA local_settings ==="
  & $sqlite $db "PRAGMA table_info(local_settings);"
  
  Write-Host "`n=== ALL remote_settings rows ==="
  & $sqlite $db "SELECT * FROM remote_settings LIMIT 5;"
  Write-Host "`n=== ALL local_settings rows ==="
  & $sqlite $db "SELECT * FROM local_settings LIMIT 5;"
  
  Write-Host "`n=== piot in all tables ==="
  & $sqlite $db "SELECT name FROM sqlite_master WHERE type='table';" | ForEach-Object {
    $t = $_.Trim()
    if ($t) {
      $cnt = & $sqlite $db "SELECT COUNT(*) FROM [$t] WHERE CAST([$t] AS TEXT) LIKE '%piot%' OR CAST([$t] AS TEXT) LIKE '%marking%' OR CAST([$t] AS TEXT) LIKE '%PiotOnline%';" 2>$null
      if ($cnt -gt 0) { Write-Host "$t : $cnt" }
    }
  }
  
  Write-Host "`n=== netstat 51401 ==="
  netstat -an | Select-String '51401'
  
  Write-Host "`n=== sentry scope (auth) ==="
  Get-Content 'C:\Users\1\AppData\Roaming\moysklad-kassa\sentry\scope_v2.json' -Raw -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-String -Pattern 'login|email|password|token|account|charisma|manager' -AllMatches | ForEach-Object { $_.Matches.Value } | Select-Object -Unique
  
  Write-Host "`n=== grep app.log piot ==="
  Select-String -Path 'C:\Users\1\AppData\Roaming\moysklad-kassa\app.log.2026-07-03' -Pattern 'Piot|piot|51401|cdn.crpt|marking' | Select-Object -Last 20
  
  Write-Host "`n=== grep main.log for credentials ==="
  Select-String -Path 'C:\Users\1\AppData\Roaming\moysklad-kassa\logs\main.log' -Pattern 'password|remap|Basic |api\.moysklad|login@|charisma' | Select-Object -Last 15
} 2>&1
input.description: Get sqlite schema and piot settings on remote

content.text:
SQLite уже содержит ESP-настройки; проверяю, слушает ли порт 51401, и пробую обновить настройки через POS API с удалённой машины.

[REDACTED]

content.text:
<timestamp>Friday, Jul 3, 2026, 3:08 PM (UTC+7)</timestamp>
<user_query>
URGENT UPDATE: User is ALREADY LOGGED IN to online.moysklad.ru in browser ON REMOTE PC 26.79.213.133 (via Radmin). Use this!

WinRM: usr1cv8/usr1cv8
Store: e87bd531-abc8-11ee-0a80-07a9004c1980 (Шоурум)
Goal: set piotSettings mode=esp, host=127.0.0.1:51401, markingEnabled=true

## Primary approach - extract browser session from remote PC
1. Find Chrome/Edge user profile on remote (Users\1\AppData\Local\Google\Chrome\User Data or Microsoft\Edge\User Data)
2. Copy Cookies sqlite (browser must stay open - copy while locked may fail, try Default\Network\Cookies or Cookies)
3. Extract cookies for online.moysklad.ru / moysklad.ru using sqlite3 at C:\Users\1\AppData\Local\Temp\sqlite-tools\sqlite3.exe
4. Use session cookies with Invoke-WebRequest to:
   - GET retail store settings page API or remap API
   - PUT/PATCH entity/retailstore/e87bd531-abc8-11ee-0a80-07a9004c1980 with piotSettings

## Alternative - UI automation on remote
If cookies work: also try navigating with Start-Process to settings URL (already open), use PowerShell SendKeys or msedge --remote-debugging if available

## After server update
1. Stop MoySklad kassa, start again OR trigger sync endpoint
2. GET posap settings/retailstore/ with token 7c003a064e8c3885cb410168fdb4505a84a5471f - verify piotSettings not null
3. Check app.log for PiotEsp/51401 not cdn.crpt.ru
4. Ensure esm-cm-00106107290460 running, port 51401 up

Report brief Russian: success/fail, what user needs to do if blocked (only if truly impossible).
</user_query>
